name: Zero Parsec
description: Essays born from questions I couldn't think my way out of without writing.
bio:
Most pieces here begin as something half-formed. A question that wouldn't leave me alone, an argument I kept having with myself, something I read or noticed that didn't resolve cleanly. Writing is how the resolution happens. Or doesn't. Either way, it ends up here.

Based somewhere quiet. Thinking about things that resist being thought about quickly.
